name: MSI H410I PRO WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel H410 Chipset - Supports DDR4-2933 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - DisplayPort - HDMI - Intel GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 802.11ac (H410IPWIFI)
shortName: MSI H410I PRO WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel
description: Compact Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel 10th gen with H410 chipset and integrated Wi-Fi for small form factor builds.
